description: Use this API to disconnect the to bus of a specified non-transformer branch or two-winding transformer from the bus to which it is currently connected, and reconnect it to a designated bus. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = movebrn(ibus, jbus, ckt, newtobus, newckt)
python_syntax: ierr = movebrn(ibus, jbus, ckt, newtobus, newckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the branch; the branch will remain connected to this bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the branch; this connection will be severed and the branch connected to bus newtobus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the branch to be rerouted. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: newtobus
parameters.description: Number of the bus to which the branch is to be connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newckt
parameters.description: New circuit identifier to be assigned to the rerouted branch. (input; CKT by default).

error_codes.description: circuit CKT from IBUS to JBUS not found.
new connection bus must not be the present from or to bus.
circuit NEWCKT from IBUS to NEWTOBUS already exists.
invalid new identifier; cannot start with &, * or @
invalid new identifier; must not be blank.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
